title: From #general
headline: Hey all! Happy Friday We want to make sure everyone has the tools they need to d...
quote: Hey all! Happy Friday We want to make sure everyone has the tools they need to do their best work — so here's a quick reminder about our Equipment Policy. Need to upgrade old equipment? If your laptop is 5+ years old (or mobile device 3+ years) and it's slowing you down, you can request an upgrade.
author: Olga Petriakova

title: From #general
headline: Hi team Thursday, June 4th, is a public holiday in Poland (Corpus Christi / Boże...
quote: Hi team Thursday, June 4th, is a public holiday in Poland (Corpus Christi / Boże Ciało), so it will be an official day off for the Polish office! Please keep this in mind when planning your work
author: Iryna Peretiatko
